visual_description: A dark‑haired man in a black leather coat stands centrally, facing forward while a dense crowd of similarly dressed figures looms behind him in a shadowy setting. The scene cuts to a young man in a patterned sweater and collared shirt standing in a stone‑walled corridor, looking slightly off‑camera with a neutral expression. The view then widens to reveal a massive assembly of people gathered in a dimly lit open area before a forest at night.
